reason: Agent successfully responded to math question with correct answer "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing list of agents
Found "QA-20260401-235621-9zrf" agent in sidebar and clicked it — Agent detail page loaded, showing "idle" status
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status indicator confirmed agent is in "idle" state (required state met)
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in message input — Message successfully entered in text field
Clicked send button — Message sent, agent status changed to "working", new session created "Basic Math Question with QA Agent"
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Response received in 1 second
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response clearly shows "4" as the answer, agent returned to "idle" status
